examples: A-Fan wants to be a taxonomist of plants.
Careers in this field include ecologist, conservationist, taxonomist, horticulturist, agronomist, plant geneticist, and many others.
Instead of using the most popular name, it was decided to abide by a code of priority and award the naming rights to the first taxonomist to describe the species.
The 21st-century answer to this 18th-century riddle is that a species is what a taxonomist says it is.
"People have biases towards species that are glamorous, " said Dr. Ernie Small, author of the study and taxonomist for Agriculture Canada.
